name: AstraZeneca plc
lede: AstraZeneca runs three centers across two Indian cities. Chennai and Bengaluru, covering GBS and GCC/GIC, built over twelve years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AstraZeneca office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AstraZeneca plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AstraZeneca runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Chennai, Bengaluru), covering GBS and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: AstraZeneca's India footprint covers Chennai and Bengaluru, spanning GBS and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 84 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: AstraZeneca operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.a: AstraZeneca's India footprint includes Chennai and 1 additional city.

faq.a: AstraZeneca runs GBS and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at AstraZeneca's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
